name: Mexican Sunrise Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the frozen juices into a medium-size punch bowl or large pitcher.
2. Add water and stir until combined.
3. Mix in tequila, ginger ale, and optional grenadine to taste.
4. Stir in ice and serve over additional ice.
5. Garnish with lime slices.
6. Makes 12 cups.
